REMARK: 06/16/2026 HEARING HELD ON EX PARTE APPLICATION TO CONTINUE HEARING ON PETITION FOR RELIEF UNDER GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 946.6 REGARDING METROPOLITAN TRANSPORTATION COMMISSION. THE COURT OFF CALENDAR THE JUNE 24,2026 MOTION CALENDAR FOR NOTICE OF HEARING FOR RELIEF FROM GOVERNEMENT CODE 945.4 UNDER GOVERNMENT CODE 946.6. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN; CLERK: M. MACADANGDANG; NOT REPORTED (302/JMQ)
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-24-26 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302
